description: Debt-lock line-count ceilings for P0 split-plan files. Reductions are allowed; increases require an explicit architecture review and baseline update.

Makefile.reason: Root Makefile must remain a thin entrypoint and delegate implementation to included fragments.

frontend/apps/web/src/pages/ContractForm.reason: Contract form route shell is under active decomposition and must not absorb new responsibilities.

frontend/apps/web/src/views/BusinessConf.reason: Business configuration surface is a P0 split-plan file and must not grow during convergence.
